style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: A clean editorial bar chart with exactly three vertical bars rising steeply from left to right on a warm cream background. The bottom axis labels, left to right, read 2022-23, then 2023-24, then 2024-25. The first bar is short, the second is roughly half again as tall, and the third is the tallest by a clear margin. A value label sits above each bar reading 81.2, then 126.3, then 189. A short title across the top reads: « Tentatives de connexion bloquées par jour, en millions ». Deep navy bars with a thin rust accent baseline, crisp legible sans-serif labels, generous whitespace, no clutter. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: A clean editorial bar chart with exactly three vertical bars rising steeply from left to right on a warm cream background. The bottom axis labels, left to right, read 2022-23, then 2023-24, then 2024-25. The first bar is short, the second is roughly half again as tall, and the third is the tallest by a clear margin. A value label sits above each bar reading 81.2, then 126.3, then 189. A short title across the top reads: « Tentatives de connexion bloquées par jour, en millions ». Deep navy bars with a thin rust accent baseline, crisp legible sans-serif labels, generous whitespace, no clutter. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
